data.body: Happy 81st birthday to Ted Sizemore.  Of the Dodgers’ 18 ROY winners, Sizemore is probably the most overlooked.  He won the award in 1969 and was traded to St. Louis after 1970 for Dick Allen.  He was traded back to LA in 1976 but was sent to the Phillies later that year.
